title: Phase 1 spec: settings sync + policy limits + rate-limit mocking + cost tracker [CC parity]
description:
## Goal

Extract a behavioral spec for this subsystem by reading Claude Code's TypeScript source. **Output**: update this issue body with a markdown spec pinning down each testable contract (input → expected output, edge cases, error paths). No Rust yet — that is Phase 2.

Parent audit: #523.

## Claude Code source — read these

- `services/settingsSync/index.ts` (~581 lines)
- `services/policyLimits/index.ts` (~663 lines) — enterprise caps
- `services/remoteManagedSettings/index.ts` (~638 lines)
- `services/mockRateLimits.ts` (~882 lines)
- `services/rateLimitMocking.ts` (~144 lines)
- `cost-tracker.ts` (~323 lines)

## OpenClaudia counterpart

- `src/session/pricing.rs` (~184 lines) — `calculate_cost` 133-149
- `src/config/mod.rs` (~338 lines) — managed_settings_path field 62-65
- `src/services/analytics.rs` (~70 lines)
- `src/services/feature_flags.rs` (~140 lines) — `is_enabled` 57-69
- **missing** — no rate-limit mock/policy enforcement
- **missing** — no remote managed-settings sync

## Behaviors to specify

For each, capture: input shape, expected output, error paths, side effects, and at least one edge case.

1. `calculate_cost(model, usage)` computes input + output + cache_read + cache_write using per-million rates
2. `FeatureFlagSource::is_enabled` checks env var override before static map
3. `AppConfig::managed_settings_path` populated when enterprise config file found
4. `AnalyticsEvent` variants forwarded to configured sink; `NoopAnalytics` discards silently
5. Unknown model in `calculate_cost`: explicit fallback or error (document which)
6. Cache-read tokens cost less than full input (pricing tier sanity check)

## Gaps already visible from the brief

These are CC features OpenClaudia does not implement. Do **not** include them in the spec — file each as a separate feature/refactor issue and link back here.

- **policyLimits missing** — file: "Add enterprise policy enforcement (token caps, tool caps, model allowlist)"
- **remoteManagedSettings missing** — already tracked under #522
- **mockRateLimits missing** — file: "Add rate-limit mocking for dev/test (parity with CC `services/mockRateLimits.ts`)"

## Done when

- This issue body has been edited to contain a markdown spec, one section per behavior above
- Each behavior section names the function(s) on both sides (or marks the OC side missing)
- Every gap above has been filed as its own issue and linked here
- The matching Phase 2 issue is unblocked
